macro_events.event_summary: Trump announced Intel will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design, sending Intel shares up 9%.
primary_drivers: Reshoring of semiconductor design/manufacturing to US — direct revenue/utilization boost for Intel foundry
Validation of Intel Foundry Services with a marquee customer (Apple), de-risking the IFS thesis
Competitive displacement risk for incumbent Apple silicon partners (TSMC)

beneficiaries.rationale: Direct beneficiary — Apple as a foundry/design partner validates Intel Foundry Services, drives utilization of 18A/Ohio fabs, and adds a credible anchor customer beyond internal products.
Intel is ASML's largest High-NA EUV customer; greater Intel foundry volume with Apple as customer accelerates lithography tool pull-through at Intel's US fabs.
Applied Materials supplies deposition/etch tools to Intel; expanded US fab utilization and capex tied to landing Apple as a foundry customer lifts WFE order book.
Lam Research has heavy exposure to Intel's logic/foundry tool spend; Apple anchor customer supports continued Ohio/Arizona buildout capex.
Process control tools tied to Intel's leading-edge ramp; Apple partnership strengthens the case for sustained 18A/14A node investment.

losers.rationale: TSMC currently manufactures essentially all of Apple's A-series and M-series silicon; any shift of Apple chip design/manufacturing work to Intel directly erodes TSMC's most profitable leading-edge customer share.
Indirect — narrative pivots semiconductor capital away from Taiwan-dependent supply chains; less direct exposure but rotation risk as flows chase Intel ecosystem.
A revitalized Intel with Apple validation strengthens Intel's competitive standing in client/server CPUs and foundry, pressuring AMD's narrative premium.
Apple is a foundational Arm architecture licensee; any Intel-Apple co-design effort that contemplates x86 or alternative ISA elements is a tail risk to Arm's perceived Apple lock-in.

headlines: Intel surges 9% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
